scripts.build: npm install -g pnpm@9 && pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile && pnpm -r --filter ./artifacts/web run build && mkdir -p dist && cp -r artifacts/web/dist/public/. dist/
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
